title: UnOredinary
description: New ores and contents to improve vanilla progression
body:
> _**Note: This mod is in early dev; please report any bugs you find!**_

> ~~⚠️**Legacy version is uncompatible**~~

> _**Require [XunLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/xunlib)**_

## Overview

Expand Minecraft's world with thoughtfully balanced ores, challenging structures, and themed mobs! Discover resources in meaningful locations like icebergs, lava lakes, and mountains. UnOredinary focuses on meaningful scarcity – common ores enable early progression, while rare finds unlock powerful (but balanced) late-game gear.

## Features

<details>
<summary>List of new Ores</summary>
  
- Cryic Ore
- Glacium Ore
- Sapphire Ore
- Luminite Ore
- Ruby Ore
  
</details>

## Support and Contribution
If you like this mod and want to support this project, considering [Buying Me a Coffee](https://buymeacoffee.com/xun_s)

Feel free to use in any modpack!
